title: KORBOND 45 Piece Set Assortment for A Multitude of Hand Sewing, Mending and Crafting Selection of Sharps, Betweens Tapestry & Darning, Silver, Home Needle Kit
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories

45 piece set of hand sewing needles offers great value and a wide selection of needles suitable for general purpose sewing, tailoring, Quilting, tapestry, yarn work, canvas, darning, mending and repairs
Manufactured from high quality hardened carbon steel to ensure the needles have appropriate strength and flex for fulfilling a multitude of sewing applications

Our products are individually tailored to uphold our performance and quality standards, delivering a consistently
description: Product Description For the tailors the Korbond needle range is manufactured from high quality hardened carbon steel to ensure the needles have appropriate strength and flex for fulfilling a multitude of sewing applications. The construction of each needle is carefully inspected to consistently deliver a precise shaped eye and clean point to eliminate fabric snagging. For the crafters Korbond 45-piece needle pack contains a selection of the most popular needles. A needle for every project and task. A must have for any crafter’s sewing box. For the make do and mender not just for creating stunning projects from scratch, this kit has everything needed to fix and embellish your wardrobe, making your favourite pieces last longer and preventing fabric waste. Safety Warning Take care when using. Not suitable for unsupervised children.
